title: The Widow in Cabin 9
tagline: Love lives here. So does arson.
theme: A town never forgets. It just redecorates.
omen: a dog barking at an empty gazebo

cast.name: Wyatt Vale
traits: replies to texts while processing betrayal
owns a structured coat for crisis scenes
secret_capacity: has an unsent email that would destroy a family
cast.regional_responsibility: serves on a board no one fully understands
cast.space_description: retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence

cast.name: Cole Pruitt
secret_capacity: once repaired a lock that should not have existed
knows more about the vineyard fire than he admits
cast.regional_responsibility: has keys to a church annex
cast.space_description: retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence
cast.suspicion_profile: knows where a secret could fit architecturally

cast.name: Claire Lark
traits: appears exactly when gossip is needed
says the dangerous thing out loud
secret_capacity: once hid a casserole dish containing evidence
cast.regional_responsibility: is trusted to lock up after emotionally charged events
cast.space_description: old storm shelter from before the divorce
cast.suspicion_profile: appears trustworthy under pendant lighting only

cast.name: Luke Pike
traits: can be therapist, realtor, widow, murderer, or all simultaneously
secret_capacity: had brunch with someone officially deceased
knows why the old orchard chapel was closed
cast.regional_responsibility: organizes a fundraiser with tense undertones
cast.space_description: dock office with a desk nobody fully claims
cast.suspicion_profile: can host Thanksgiving but could move a body-shaped rug

cast.name: Rachel Vale
secret_capacity: had an engagement that ended under suspiciously quiet circumstances
cast.regional_responsibility: serves on a board no one fully understands
cast.space_description: marina tackle room described as old family things

cast.name: Jenna Hale
secret_capacity: accused an innocent scamp and feels sick about it
cast.regional_responsibility: is trusted to lock up after emotionally charged events

cast.name: Noah Dane
traits: knows the old case too well

beat_sheet.text: Wyatt Vale relocates to Bellweather after an emotionally negligent implosion and pretends work explains everything while quietly inheriting retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence. Emotional exposition arrives on schedule with insanity multiplier 1.00.

contradiction_ledger.entry: Cole Pruitt is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
Wyatt Vale says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Alder Ridge.

dialogue_samples: "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Cole?"
"Mothers do not disappear, Sienna. They evaporate into paperwork."
"I checked his social media likes, Wyatt. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
"The boat key is not decorative anymore and you know it."
"Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Luke."
"You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
"If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
"I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
fake_critic_blurb: "The Widow in Cabin 9 understands that menace is a regional utility." - County Suspense Quarterly
sequel_hook: Channel 8 Night Report hints that the vineyard fire had a witness who still hosts brunch.
synopsis: Inspired by true events in the emotional sense only, "The Widow in Cabin 9" follows Wyatt Vale, an overextended professional woman who mistakes productivity for safety until overbearing mother tension collides with Cole Pruitt, a comforting regional adult carrying portable suspicion and plausible access to offsite storage. As a dog barking at an empty gazebo, Blackthorn County reveals once again that every secret comes home and every adult has somewhere emotionally alarming to stand in silence. Love lives here. So does arson.
